title: How to calculate each row as a percentage of the total
task: Show what share of the grand total each value represents.

excel.note: Lock the total range with $ so it stays fixed when you drag. Format as %.

explanation: Divide each value by the sum of the whole range, keeping the range absolute ($) so it does not shift as you fill down. 25 out of a total of 100 is 0.25 = 25%.
